org.moeaframework.core.variable.BinaryVariable

Packages that use BinaryVariable
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary
Collection of operators for binary-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.

    Mutates the specified variable using bit flip mutation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    EncodingUtils.decode(BinaryVariable binary, RealVariable real)
    Decodes the specified binary variable into its real value.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.encode(RealVariable real, BinaryVariable binary)
    Encodes the specified real variable into a binary variable.
    int
    BinaryVariable.hammingDistance(BinaryVariable variable)
    Returns the Hamming distance between this instance and the specified BinaryVariable.
